questions.text: Outline any concerns regarding the impact of the Acquisition on competition, including if Quanta and its companies in Australia, Consolidated Power Projects Australia Pty Ltd (CPP) and Intellect Systems Pty Ltd (IS), are close competitors with PSD and if there are not many alternatives.

questions.section: Procurement of design and construction services for high voltage electrical infrastructure projects
questions.text: Identify any projects for which you have procured high voltage electrical infrastructure design and construction (HV D&C) services in the last three years. For each project, outline the scope of the project, project value, the parties that tendered, and the successful party.

Identify the suppliers you consider when procuring HV D&C services (for customers) or that you compete against when supplying HV D&C services (for competitors). Briefly describe the offerings and competitive strengths and weaknesses of each supplier.

Describe any differences in the requirements for HV D&C services for smaller scale, lower value projects and large-scale higher value projects. Explain whether the size of a project affects whether certain suppliers are suitable for the project.

questions.section: Suppliers of electrical protection panels and/or switchrooms
questions.text: Identify the suppliers that you consider when procuring electrical protection panels and/or switchrooms (for customers) or that you compete against when supplying electrical protection panels and/or switchrooms (for competitors). Briefly describe the offerings and competitive strengths and weaknesses of each supplier.

questions.section: Suppliers of electrical protection panels and/or switchrooms
questions.text: Outline the costs and challenges that suppliers of panels and switchrooms located outside of Western Australia may face when supplying panels and switchrooms to customers in Western Australia.
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.
Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including the geographic areas that you operate in and any commercial relationships with Quanta, including CPP and IS, and/or PSD.
